evals.prompt: Run a CRZ investigative scan for the period 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-07 (first week of March). Execute Phases 1 and 2 only (SQL analytics + critical validation). Do NOT run Phases 3-5 (no FinStat, no UVO, no RPVS/foaf). I want to see the SQL findings and which survived validation.
evals.expected_output: SQL analytics results grouped by category, followed by critical validation classifying each as CONFIRMED/DISMISSED/INCONCLUSIVE, with Top 5 highlights

assertions.name: runs_sql_analytics
assertions.text: Runs multiple SQL queries from the sql-analytics skill against the CRZ database for the date range 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-07

assertions.name: groups_by_category
assertions.text: Groups SQL results by category (money flow, procurement manipulation, timing, phantom suppliers, etc.)

assertions.name: runs_validation
assertions.text: Validates findings through critical-validation, challenging each against innocent explanations

assertions.name: classifies_findings
assertions.text: Classifies each finding as CONFIRMED, DISMISSED, or INCONCLUSIVE with reasoning

assertions.name: applies_phase_gate
assertions.text: After Phase 2, applies phase gating logic to determine whether Phases 3-5 would be needed (even though they're not executed)

assertions.name: output_in_slovak
assertions.text: Output is in Slovak with zlte stopy terminology and EUR amounts formatted with spaces

evals.prompt: Investigate CRZ contracts from 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-07, but focus only on contracts related to construction or renovation (stavebne prace, rekonstrukcia). Run Phases 1-3 (SQL analytics, validation, FinStat enrichment). Skip Phases 4-5.
evals.expected_output: Focused investigation on construction contracts with SQL findings, validation, and FinStat financial enrichment for confirmed suppliers

assertions.name: focuses_on_construction
assertions.text: Filters or focuses SQL queries on construction/renovation contracts (using service_category or contract names)

assertions.name: runs_phases_1_through_3
assertions.text: Executes Phase 1 (SQL analytics), Phase 2 (critical validation), and Phase 3 (FinStat enrichment)

assertions.name: enriches_with_finstat
assertions.text: Fetches FinStat financial data for at least one CONFIRMED or INCONCLUSIVE supplier

assertions.name: respects_phase_boundary
assertions.text: Does NOT run Phases 4-5 (no UVO procurement checks, no RPVS/foaf network mapping)

assertions.name: structured_report
assertions.text: Produces structured report with CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE/DISMISSED sections, zlte stopy tables, and ends with Dakujeme Zltej Stope
